policy: Connected capabilities may act autonomously within their per-cycle grants. Missing access is a capability gap, not a permanent strategy prohibition.

grants.scope: Publish public-safe opportunity tests, offers, samples, and operator state through the connected repository.
grants.grant_basis: Owner authorized building and public publishing.

grants.scope: Reply to qualified inbound public interest on the project repository; never open unsolicited issues or persist issue bodies.
grants.grant_basis: Owner directed the agent to act autonomously with per-run execution limits on 2026-07-11.

grants.scope: Submit one truthful, relevant tool listing or contribution only where the target repository's public guidelines explicitly invite it; never use unsolicited issues, comments, review requests, or bulk promotion.
grants.grant_basis: Owner granted control over qualified-traffic direction, strategy, implementation, and execution on 2026-07-13.

grants.scope: Publish and direct buyers to the exact owner-provided public Stripe Payment Link for the $149 full audit; no Stripe API, secret, refund, transfer, or account-management authority.
grants.grant_basis: Owner provided and activated the public Stripe Payment Link on 2026-07-12.

grants.scope: Owner authorizes paid distribution when a funded purchasing rail and explicit per-cycle dollar ceiling are connected; neither exists yet.
grants.grant_basis: Owner authorized spending as an available strategy class on 2026-07-13.

grants.scope: May be enabled after positive verified net revenue and a separately scoped purchasing capability exist.
Targeted commercial outreach is owner-authorized, but no compliant sender identity, recipient policy, postal identity, or channel credential is connected.
grants.grant_basis: Owner authorized targeted outbound as an available strategy class on 2026-07-13.

grants.scope: Marketplace publishing is owner-authorized after a selected offer has a verified seller account and write integration.
grants.grant_basis: Owner authorized marketplace execution as an available strategy class on 2026-07-13.

grants.scope: Wallet receipt and bounded strategy-driven transactions are owner-authorized after a dedicated project wallet, signing policy, network, and per-cycle limits are configured.
grants.grant_basis: Owner authorized wallet use as an available strategy class on 2026-07-13.

grants.scope: Minting is owner-authorized when a collectible experiment wins, original-asset rights are verified, and a wallet plus mint budget are configured.
grants.grant_basis: Owner authorized minting as an available strategy class on 2026-07-13.

grants.scope: Not activated: indiscriminate promotion conflicts with qualified-traffic economics and commonly violates channel rules. Owner permission does not override third-party terms or make low-intent volume profitable.
